name: Amaana Money Transfer CO
description_short: Amaana Money Transfer offers fund transfer services in Minneapolis with extended hours and convenient Lake Street location. Provides money transfer and related financial services.
description_long:
Amaana Money Transfer operates as a fund transfer service provider based in Minneapolis, Minnesota. The company is located at 139 Lake St W, positioned between Lake St W/Pillsbury Ave and Blaisdell Ave, serving the local community with accessible financial services. Limited public information is available about the company's founding or operational history beyond its current business classification.

Based on available data, Amaana Money Transfer operates within the check-cashing and fund transfer category, offering services typical to this sector. The company maintains a physical retail location with regular business hours, suggesting in-person service delivery. The specific service offerings are not detailed in the available business listing, though the company name and category suggest international or domestic money transfer capabilities alongside check-cashing services.

The business distinguishes itself through extended operational hours, remaining open 10:00 AM to 8:00 PM Monday through Friday and Sunday, with Saturday hours from 12:00 AM to 12:00 AM. This schedule exceeds typical banking hours and suggests an attempt to serve customers with varying availability. The location on Lake Street places the business in an accessible, retail-oriented area of Minneapolis.

Consumers should note that detailed information about fee structures, transfer limits, processing times, partner networks, and regulatory compliance is not available through the public listing. Before using services, customers should directly contact the business at (612) 259-7940 to understand pricing, available destinations, and service terms. As with any money transfer service, consumers should verify licensing and compare offerings against competitors.
pros: Extended weekday and Sunday hours (10 AM–8 PM) accommodating working customers
Accessible Lake Street location in Minneapolis serving local community
Open Saturday full day (12 AM–12 AM) for weekend service access
Physical in-person location allowing face-to-face service and verification
Direct phone contact available at (612) 259-7940 for customer service
cons: No detailed information available about fee structure or pricing transparency
Service offerings not clearly specified beyond generic 'fund transfer' category
No information provided about transfer destinations, limits, or processing times
Limited online presence and no details about regulatory licensing or compliance
No customer reviews or ratings available to assess service quality
best_for: Local Minneapolis residents needing in-person check cashing or money transfers
Customers preferring extended weekday and weekend service hours
Those seeking alternative financial services outside traditional banking hours
diagnosis: Amaana Money Transfer is best for Minneapolis-area residents needing fund transfer or check-cashing services with flexible hours. The main caveat is that detailed service information, fee structures, and customer reviews are unavailable online—contact the business directly at (612) 259-7940 before committing to any transactions.
